name: io.github.clawypro/clawy-mcp-server
description: Pay-per-use MCP server for AI agents — 15 API tools (DART, Tabelog, Google Maps, Brave Search, Firecrawl, DeepL, ElevenLabs, and more) + smart LLM routing (Claude, GPT, Gemini). No API keys needed, authenticate with Ethereum wallet and pay with USDC on Base chain.

environmentVariables.description: Ethereum wallet private key for authentication (hex with 0x prefix). Use a dedicated wallet.
environmentVariables.name: CLAWY_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
